title: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
summary_full: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.
summary_public: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.
